##NAMES=Manganogrunerite
##RRUFFID=R060378
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box]Mn_2_Fe^2+^_5_Si_8_O_22_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Brunsjogruvan (Brunsjo mine), near Hallefors, Orebro, Sweden
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Brown parallel fibers
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060378
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=Mn^2+^_2.00_(Fe^2+^_3.30_Mg_1.60_Ca_0.10_)Si_8.00_O_22_(OH)_2_
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.6153 b: 18.2653 c: 5.3338 alpha: 90 beta: 102.265 gamma: 90 volume: 915.39 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
